title: More_Tree_Sizes
description: Adds more vanilla trees to your world in different sizes to help spice up your landscape while keeping the game vanilla friendly.
body:
I made this mod becasue I just wanted a simple mod that would add a little more tree variety to my game without needing to install a major mod that required constant updating or complex api dependencies.  This is just a simple mod that adds trees. Oddly, this didn't seem to exist as many of the tree mods were overly complex, or completly changed minecraft trees and biomes.  This one does not do that. It is a No Fuss tree mod that just adds in a few tree sizes. It does not alter existing vanilla trees.

This is a simple vanilla friendly mod that adds three new tree sizes to your world: Medium, Large and Huge.

These trees will spawn sporadically in their respective biomes, blending into the landscape, yet adding some variety to the trees and skyline of your game. Cherry trees in the cherry biome, birch trees in the birch forest biomes, Acacia trees in Savannah biomes, etc... (Note, version 1.19.2 wont include cherry trees.)

The large trees are about twice the size of normal trees, and the huge trees are about 4 to 5 times as large and are rare, but beautiful to behold and could serve as excellent base locations or the source of a lot of wood.

Due to the size of the huge tree canopy, mobs may spawn naturally under/in them during the day, but if you've ever cliimbed a real tree, then you know spiders are a pretty common occurance in the real world.

This mod does not have any dependencies.

Did I mention this mod is simple and just adds trees?

Curerntly available on forge 1.19.2 , 1.20.1 and NeoForge1.21.1

Yes, you may include this in your modpack.
